message:
chore(audit): extend batch 406 (session, h1/listener, env_config, fault channel)

Fresh-eyes audit of 6 additional files (~5,521 lines):
- src/web/session.rs (915L): SOUND — session fixation prevention
- src/http/h1/listener.rs (919L): SOUND — accept loop, drain lifecycle
- src/runtime/env_config.rs (771L): SOUND — env/TOML config parsing
- src/channel/fault.rs (1248L): SOUND — RAII message guards
- src/runtime/sharded_state.rs (1416L): SOUND — lock ordering
- src/console.rs (partial read): no issues noted

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
